description.zh-Hans: 使用均匀量化减少图像颜色数量，支持可配置抖动（有序Bayer抖动或误差扩散）。生成有限调色板的像素艺术风格输出。
description.en: Reduces the number of colors in an image using uniform quantization with configurable dithering (ordered Bayer or error diffusion). Produces a limited-palette pixel art style output.

triggers.zh-Hans: 颜色量化, 减少颜色, 抖动, 像素艺术调色板, Bayer抖动, Floyd-Steinberg
triggers.en: color quantize, reduce colors, dither, pixel art palette, Bayer dither, Floyd-Steinberg

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将照片量化为16色像素艺术风格，并应用Floyd-Steinberg抖动。
exampleUsage.en: Quantize a photo to 16 colors in pixel art style with Floyd-Steinberg dithering.
